subject: Don't miss out on amazing savings
body:
XM: ARE YOU ON?

--NOW THERE'S EVEN --
MORE ON XM.

----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear JEFFREY EPSTEIN,

Since you tried us we have some new channels and old favorites 
that you may have missed.

----------------------------------------------------------------
• Hear more great commercial-free music channels
• Check out XMX(TM)– the home for exclusive concerts and 
  original series hosted by music legends like Bob Dylan, 
  Tom Petty and more 
• Get non-stop sports action with every MLB(R) team and game 
  plus the PGA TOUR, NHL and college sports play-by-play
• Stay current with CNN, FOX News Channel and the new 
  POTUS '08(TM) -- our presidential election channel 

----------------------------------------------------------------
ENJOY XM IN YOUR CAR OR ON THE GO.
Check out great deals for yourself or as a gift.

SAVE $40
XpressEZ(TM) NOW $24.99

• Listen in your car
• Listen at home with purchase of a home kit 
• Large, easy-to-read screen
• Quick navigation with tune-and-press dial

SAVE $70
inno(R) NOW $179.99

• Listen and record XM
• Store MP3s 
• Completely portable
• Discover new music 
  with XM + Napster

  
----------------------------------------------------------------
To visit the XpressEZ(TM), please go to:
http://xmradio.chtah.com/a/tBIX8nwB7RCeLB7RnGK$AHapTKH/xm5

To visit the inno(R), please go to:
http://xmradio.chtah.com/a/tBIX8nwB7RCeLB7RnGK$AHapTKH/xm1
----------------------------------------------------------------
Having XM is like having a soundtrack to your life. Come on. 
Don’t miss another minute. 

Limited time offer. Call us at 1-888-243-4296 or go to:
http://xmradio.chtah.com/a/tBIX8nwB7RCeLB7RnGK$AHapTKH/xm9
----------------------------------------------------------------
P.S. XM is a great gift for grads!
XMROTRLR3D25												RO4 

----------------------------------------------------------------

Offer expires 9/30/08 while supplies last. Nonrefundable 
prepayment of three (3) months of service required, and service 
will renew on quarterly payment terms after initial three (3) 
months. Subject to $100 early cancellation fee if twelve (12) 
months of continuous service is not maintained. You must be 
authorized to redeem this offer. Exclusive offer cannot be 
combined with other offers, and is only valid in the 48 
contiguous United States. Other fees and programming subject to 
change. Games subject to availability and change.  Subscription
subject to Customer Agreement available at xmradio.com. XM 
service only available in the 48 contiguous United States.
NHL.com is the official Web site of the National Hockey League. 
NHL is a registered trademark and the NHL Shield is a trademark 
of the National Hockey League. All NHL logos and marks depicted 
herein are the property of the NHL and may not be reproduced 
without the prior written consent of NHL Enterprises, 
L. P. (R) NHL 2008. All Rights Reserved. (R) 2008 MLB 
Advanced Media, L.P. All rights reserved.  All Major League 
Baseball trademarks and service marks used herein are the 
property of the applicable MLB entity. All other marks used 
herein are trademarks or registered trademarks of their 
respective owners.

To ensure receipt of your XM emails, please add 
xmradio@email.xmradio.com to your address book. 
You are receiving this email because you previously indicated 
that you’d like to receive email updates from XM Satellite 
Radio. 
To unsubscribe, please visit http://xmradio.chtah.com/a/tBIX8nwB7RCeLB7RnGK$AHapTKH/xm13 
----------------------------------------------------------------
XM Satellite Radio, 1500 
Eckington Place, NE. Washington, DC 20002
